item_specifications.special_feature: Foldable, Lightweight, Machine Wash and Dry

about_item: Compact and Foldable - This portable dog mat for pets up to 50 lbs compactly rolls up to 14 x 9 x 5-inches, making it simple to pack away for adventures with your furry friend. It's designed with a sturdy, easy-to-carry handle.

Lightweight Material - Made from water-resistant polyester wrapped in super soft faux rabbit fur, our 1.5 lb. Nap Mat is the perfect travel companion for your pup. The cozy materials will keep your pet comfortable on the go.

Convenient Care - This washable dog travel mat can be put directly into the washing machine and tumble-dried at a low temperature to easily keep your furry friend's space fresh. Say goodbye to messy cleanups and hello to a hassle-free travel experience.

The Perfect Size - Our travel bed spreads out to 37 x 28 x 0.5 inches so your small or medium size pets can enjoy their own space for relaxation anytime and anywhere. Take this paw-friendly mat with you so your pup will feel comfy wherever you go!

Durable Construction - The KindTail sleeping mat's durable materials are ideal for all travel and activities - from quick car trips to the great outdoors. Our versatile base layer and soft cover will withstand even the most energetic play.

authors_reviews.title: I call this my EVERYTHING mat. A must have for pets, adult people and human children!
authors_reviews.text: I can't say enough great things about this Kind Tail Nap Mat. It's more than a Travel Dog Bed, it's a washable, water-resistant "sitting" mat for people and kids too. I'll explain.Dogs: My dog trainer gave me a small mat to train my dog to go to whenever I needed her to lay down and stay put. It was a flimsy mat that she gave out to all her trainees for free. I wanted something higher in quality and durable. Not only is this mat beautiful with an attractive design, but it is also soft, the size is as advertised, it is lightweight, folds up easily into a small bag with handle, and looks like new again after being washed in my washing machine.Disabled or Elderly People: Now for me... I recently underwent two major surgeries back-to-back. I live alone with 6 dogs. My family comes over to help me, but sometimes I need to get on the floor and sweep up with a small hand broom (I'm too weak to do it from standing up). This mat has sufficient cushion to keep me comfortable sitting on it (at 185lbs now). It also slides on my wood grain floor easily so scooting along to sweep up has never been easier. The faux rabbit fur feels really nice on my bare legs, feet, and swollen ankles too.For parents of actual human children (haha), this mat is ALSO perfect. Put it in the bottom of your shopping cart for your kids to sit on without getting dirty. It is thick and firm enough to keep them comfortable. It has a handle and is light enough for your kids to carry as their own (with a small pocket for them to stuff their favorite toy into as well). Think of the airport and how your child wants to sit on the floor - not up on those uncomfortable chairs. This is the soft, sanitary barrier you've been looking for.I could go on about this little mat for days, but long reviews are often skipped over, and I don't want anyone to skip this one. I'll be adding a video later, as it's still in the dryer getting fluffed up for the 10+ time. Until I can walk and stand and clean normally on my own again, this mat is my best friend.
authors_reviews.author: KiwiMe

authors_reviews.title: About to get another one so we have more mat surface area
authors_reviews.text: Excellent packable bed that's easy to pack. That's really the key isn't it? PACKABILITY. If I can't pack it back into the form it originally came in, the convenience is completely lost. This is a great example of that being taken into account. It's durable and washes quite easily. It got super dirty from rain and mud and washed right off. I wouldn't say it's the softest, but for the durability and reusability, my dog doesn't mind either.
authors_reviews.author: San Geo

authors_reviews.title: Perfect Travel Bed for On-the-Go Dogs
authors_reviews.text: I bought this Nomad nap mat for trips and outings with my dog, and it’s been a great purchase. It’s lightweight and easy to fold, and the carry handle makes it simple to bring along anywhere. The material feels durable and slightly water-resistant, which is helpful for outdoor use. My dog seems comfortable lying on it, and it gives him a familiar spot to relax when we’re away from home. I also appreciate that it’s machine washable, which makes cleanup easy. For the price, the quality and convenience make it a really practical travel bed for dogs.
authors_reviews.author: Marlinda Davis

authors_reviews.title: Small but convenient
authors_reviews.text: This dog travel bed is pretty small. It’s also on the thin side, but it is a travel dog bed. I’d personally call it a dog or pet mat rather than dog bed because it’s so thin. The mat is soft. It’s good for a small or small to medium dog. It does fold up nicely to take with you. The quality is good. The stitching is clear and straight. The padding is even. We go camping a lot and my dogs don’t like to lay on the ground, so this was nice to have with when we were by the campfire. Yes my dogs are pampered. It works great for what it is. I would personally like it to be a thicker mat but it is nice.
authors_reviews.author: M. R.

authors_reviews.title: Perfect for when our pup needs to place, holds up great to her pawing it
authors_reviews.text: One of our younger pups has a tendency to find her way in to trouble. She is trained to place. This dog bed is easy to take along to have her place at a brewery, home or on a trip. It folds up and carries nicely.I really like that one side is soft so when she is laying on it in the chillier months it is more warm than other similar items.There is a small pocket to tuck items into. Once it is folded up there is a handle at the top.Quality has been great. All of the seams and edges look nice. The blanket is symmetrical. Even more surprising this week she has been digging on them pawing the blanket and they look just the same as before she started. Which is better than some crate mats that she has had.For a size reference the dog in my review photos is a 20 lbs. Cavapoo rescue.Would absolutely choose this again and would recommend!
authors_reviews.author: FlyingUnicorns

authors_reviews.title: Thin for the price
authors_reviews.text: This pet mat is nice in design for folding up and carrying but the $50 price tag doesn't seem worth it to me. The design and stitching look like it will last a long time but being so thin and light, I don't see it being more practical than a cheap folded fleece blanket. It seems more material was put into this for looks than for softness. I bought it for our cats and they do use it when I put it down but that is cat curiosity, I have not had a single cat go to sleep on it yet. If you are buying for looks, this is a good buy I guess. If you are buying for value or pet comfort I would not recommend this.
authors_reviews.author: James

authors_reviews.title: Actually Folds Small and Is Feather-Light
authors_reviews.text: I got this for weekend trips and taking my dogs to cafes, and it is absolutely perfect. The 1.5 lb weight is incredible—I barely notice it in my tote bag. The ability to fold it down small is genius, and the built-in carry handle is so convenient. My Frenchies love the cushioning, and I love that I can quickly toss it in the wash after a dirty day at the park. This is exactly the highly portable, no-fuss travel solution every pet owner needs. Worth every penny for the convenience alone!
authors_reviews.author: Reh

authors_reviews.title: Not non-slip
authors_reviews.text: This mat is supposed to be non-slip but unfortunately slides all over the place.
authors_reviews.author: KJ
